class VideoViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    queryset = Video.objects.all()
    serializer_class = VideoSerializer
    parser_classes = [MultiPartParser, FormParser]
    filter_backends = [DjangoFilterBackend, SearchFilter, OrderingFilter]
    filterset_fields = [
        'status', 'source_format', 'source_condition', 'needs_review',
        'recording_quality'
    ]
    search_fields = [
        'title', 'description', 'source_location', 'donor_contact',
        'estimated_date_range', 'acquisition_notes'
    ]
    ordering_fields = ['upload_date', 'title', 'estimated_date_range']
    ordering = ['-upload_date']
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['post'])
    def upload(self, request):
        """Upload video file to Cloudflare Stream"""
        if 'file' not in request.FILES:
            return Response(
                {'error': 'No file provided'}, 
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST
            )
        
        file_obj = request.FILES['file']
        title = request.data.get('title', file_obj.name)
        description = request.data.get('description', '')
        
        # Upload to Cloudflare Stream
        api = CloudflareStreamAPI()
        upload_result = api.upload_video(
            file_obj,
            metadata={'name': title}
        )
        
        if not upload_result:
            return Response(
                {'error': 'Failed to upload to Cloudflare Stream'},
                status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
            )
        
        # Create Video record
        video = Video.objects.create(
            title=title,
            description=description,
            source_format=request.data.get('source_format', 'unknown'),
            source_condition=request.data.get('source_condition', ''),
            source_location=request.data.get('source_location', ''),
            estimated_date_range=request.data.get('estimated_date_range', ''),
            donor_contact=request.data.get('donor_contact', ''),
            cloudflare_stream_id=upload_result['uid'],
            cloudflare_playback_url=api.get_hls_url(upload_result['uid']),
            cloudflare_thumbnail_url=upload_result.get('thumbnail', ''),
            status='processing'
        )
        
        serializer = self.get_serializer(video)
        return Response(serializer.data, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
    
    @action(detail=True, methods=['post'])
    def refresh_metadata(self, request, pk=None):
        """Refresh video metadata from Cloudflare Stream"""
        video = self.get_object()
        api = CloudflareStreamAPI()
        
        details = api.get_video_details(video.cloudflare_stream_id)
        if details:
            video.duration_seconds = details.get('duration')
            video.cloudflare_playback_url = api.get_hls_url(video.cloudflare_stream_id)
            video.cloudflare_thumbnail_url = details.get('thumbnail', '')
            video.status = 'ready' if details.get('status', {}).get('state') == 'ready' else 'processing'
            video.save()
        
        serializer = self.get_serializer(video)
        return Response(serializer.data)
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'])
    def needs_review(self, request):
        """Get videos that need archival review"""
        videos = self.queryset.filter(needs_review=True)
        serializer = self.get_serializer(videos, many=True)
        return Response(serializer.data)
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'])
    def unarchived(self, request):
        """Get videos with no clips yet"""
        videos = self.queryset.filter(clips__isnull=True, status='ready')
        serializer = self.get_serializer(videos, many=True)
        return Response(serializer.data)

class ClipViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    queryset = Clip.objects.all()
    filter_backends = [DjangoFilterBackend, SearchFilter, OrderingFilter]
    filterset_fields = [
        'video', 'performance', 'piece', 'performers', 'content_type',
        'identification_confidence', 'video_quality', 'audio_quality'
    ]
    search_fields = [
        'title', 'description', 'archival_notes', 'technical_notes',
        'act_scene', 'music_section', 'movement_tags'
    ]
    ordering_fields = [
        'created_at', 'video__upload_date', 'performance__date', 
        'start_time_seconds', 'identification_confidence'
    ]
    ordering = ['-created_at']
    
    def get_serializer_class(self):
        if self.action == 'create':
            return ClipCreateSerializer
        return ClipSerializer
    
    @action(detail=True, methods=['get'])
    def embed_code(self, request, pk=None):
        """Get HTML embed code for this clip"""
        clip = self.get_object()
        api = CloudflareStreamAPI()
        
        embed_code = api.generate_embed_code(
            clip.video.cloudflare_stream_id,
            start_time=clip.start_time_seconds,
            use_iframe=False  # Use Video.js for better control
        )
        
        return Response({'embed_code': embed_code})
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'])
    def unidentified(self, request):
        """Get clips that need archival attention"""
        clips = self.queryset.filter(content_type='unknown')
        serializer = self.get_serializer(clips, many=True)
        return Response(serializer.data)
    
    @action(detail=False, methods=['get'])
    def needs_verification(self, request):
        """Get clips with low confidence identification"""
        clips = self.queryset.filter(
            identification_confidence__in=['uncertain', 'possible']
        )
        serializer = self.get_serializer(clips, many=True)
        return Response(serializer.data)

    ]

    ]

    ]
    readonly_fields = [
        'cloudflare_stream_id', 'cloudflare_playback_url',
        'cloudflare_thumbnail_url', 'upload_date', 'created_at', 'updated_at'
    ]
    
    fieldsets = [
        ('Basic Information', {
            'fields': ('title', 'description', 'status')
        }),
        ('Source Information', {
            'fields': (
                'source_format', 'source_condition', 'source_location',
                'estimated_date_range', 'donor_contact', 'acquisition_notes'
            )
        }),
        ('Cloudflare Stream', {
            'fields': (
                'cloudflare_stream_id', 'cloudflare_playback_url',
                'cloudflare_thumbnail_url', 'duration_seconds'
            )
        }),
        ('Technical Details', {
            'fields': (
                'recording_quality', 'digitization_notes'
            )
        }),

            'fields': ('needs_review',)
        }),
        ('System', {
            'fields': ('upload_date', 'created_at', 'updated_at'),
            'classes': ['collapse']
        })
    ]
    
    def get_urls(self):
        urls = super().get_urls()
        custom_urls = [
            path(
                '<int:video_id>/create-clips/',
                self.admin_site.admin_view(self.create_clips_view),
                name='archive_video_create_clips',
            ),
            path(
                '<int:video_id>/clips/<uuid:clip_id>/edit/',
                self.admin_site.admin_view(self.edit_clip_view),
                name='archive_video_edit_clip',
            ),
            path(
                'api/create-clip/',
                self.admin_site.admin_view(self.create_clip_api),
                name='archive_video_create_clip_api',
            ),
        ]
        return custom_urls + urls
    
    def create_clips_view(self, request, video_id):
        """Custom admin view for creating clips with video player interface"""
        video = get_object_or_404(Video, id=video_id)
        
        if video.status != 'ready':
            messages.error(request, 'Video must be ready before creating clips.')
            return redirect('admin:archive_video_changelist')
        
        clips = video.clips.all().order_by('start_time_seconds')
        people = Person.objects.all()
        pieces = Piece.objects.all()
        performances = Performance.objects.all().order_by('-date')
        
        context = {
            'video': video,
            'clips': clips,
            'people': people,
            'pieces': pieces,
            'performances': performances,
            'title': f'Archive & Clip - {video.title}',
            'opts': self.model._meta,
            'has_change_permission': True,
            'original': video,
        }
        
        return render(request, 'admin/archive/video_clipping.html', context)
    
    def edit_clip_view(self, request, video_id, clip_id):
        """Edit individual clip with form"""
        video = get_object_or_404(Video, id=video_id)
        clip = get_object_or_404(Clip, id=clip_id, video=video)
        
        if request.method == 'POST':
            form = ClipForm(request.POST, instance=clip)
            if form.is_valid():
                form.save()
                messages.success(request, f'Clip "{clip.title}" updated successfully.')
                return redirect('admin:archive_video_create_clips', video_id=video.id)
        else:
            form = ClipForm(instance=clip)
        
        context = {
            'form': form,
            'video': video,
            'clip': clip,
            'title': f'Edit Clip - {clip.title}',
            'opts': self.model._meta,
        }
        
        return render(request, 'admin/archive/edit_clip.html', context)
    
    @require_http_methods(["POST"])
    def create_clip_api(self, request):
        """API endpoint for creating clips via AJAX"""
        try:
            video_id = request.POST.get('video_id')
            video = get_object_or_404(Video, id=video_id)
            
            clip = Clip.objects.create(
                video=video,
                title=request.POST.get('title', 'Untitled Clip'),
                description=request.POST.get('description', ''),
                start_time_seconds=int(request.POST.get('start_time')),
                end_time_seconds=int(request.POST.get('end_time')),
                content_type=request.POST.get('content_type', 'unknown'),
                act_scene=request.POST.get('act_scene', ''),
                music_section=request.POST.get('music_section', ''),
                technical_notes=request.POST.get('technical_notes', ''),
                archival_notes=request.POST.get('archival_notes', ''),
                camera_angle=request.POST.get('camera_angle', ''),
                identification_confidence=request.POST.get('identification_confidence', 'uncertain'),
                verified_by=request.user,
                verification_date=timezone.now()
            )
            
            # Add performance if provided
            performance_id = request.POST.get('performance')
            if performance_id:
                clip.performance_id = performance_id
                clip.save()
            
            # Add performers if provided
            performer_ids = request.POST.getlist('performers')
            if performer_ids:
                clip.performers.set(performer_ids)
            
            # Add piece if provided
            piece_id = request.POST.get('piece')
            if piece_id:
                clip.piece_id = piece_id
                clip.save()
            
            # Add movement tags if provided
            movement_tags = request.POST.get('movement_tags', '')
            if movement_tags:
                clip.movement_tags = [tag.strip() for tag in movement_tags.split(',') if tag.strip()]
                clip.save()
            
            return JsonResponse({
                'success': True,
                'clip_id': str(clip.id),
                'message': f'Clip "{clip.title}" created successfully!'
            })
            
        except Exception as e:
            return JsonResponse({
                'success': False,
                'error': str(e)
            }, status=400)
    
    def clips_count(self, obj):
        return obj.clips.count()
    clips_count.short_description = 'Clips'
    
    def needs_review_indicator(self, obj):
        if obj.needs_review:
            return format_html('<span style="color: red;">⚠ Needs Review</span>')
        identified_clips = obj.clips.exclude(content_type='unknown').count()
        total_clips = obj.clips.count()
        if total_clips == 0:
            return format_html('<span style="color: orange;">📹 No clips yet</span>')
        elif identified_clips == total_clips:
            return format_html('<span style="color: green;">✓ Fully archived</span>')
        else:
            return format_html(f'<span style="color: orange;">⏳ {identified_clips}/{total_clips} identified</span>')
    needs_review_indicator.short_description = 'Archive Status'
    
    def clipping_actions(self, obj):
        if obj.status == 'ready':
            clips_url = reverse('admin:archive_video_create_clips', args=[obj.id])
            return format_html(
                '<a class="button" href="{}">Archive & Clip</a>',
                clips_url
            )
        return '-'
    clipping_actions.short_description = 'Actions'

@admin.register(Clip)
class ClipAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [

<!-- Video.js JavaScript -->
<script src="https://vjs.zencdn.net/8.6.1/video.min.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize Video.js player
    const player = videojs('archive-video-player', {
        responsive: true,
        fluid: false,
        playbackRates: [0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 2],
        controls: true,
        preload: 'auto'
    });
    
    // Video state
    let startTime = null;
    let endTime = null;
    let videoFPS = 30; // Default, could be detected from video metadata
    const videoDuration = {{ video.duration_seconds|default:0 }};
    
    // DOM elements
    const timeline = document.getElementById('timeline');
    const clipMarker = document.getElementById('clip-marker');
    const currentTimeDisplay = document.getElementById('current-time');
    const currentFrameDisplay = document.getElementById('current-frame');
    const clipDurationDisplay = document.getElementById('clip-duration');
    const startTimeTc = document.getElementById('start-time-tc');
    const endTimeTc = document.getElementById('end-time-tc');
    const startTimeInput = document.getElementById('start-time-input');
    const endTimeInput = document.getElementById('end-time-input');
    
    // Wait for player to be ready
    player.ready(function() {
        console.log('Video player is ready!');
        
        // Update FPS if we can detect it
        const tech = player.tech();
        if (tech && tech.el() && tech.el().videoWidth) {
            // Could try to detect FPS from metadata, defaulting to 30
            videoFPS = 30;
        }
        
        updateTimeDisplays();
    });
    
    // Real time tracking from Video.js
    player.on('timeupdate', function() {
        updateTimeDisplays();
        updateTimelinePosition();
    });
    
    player.on('loadedmetadata', function() {
        console.log('Video metadata loaded');
        console.log('Duration:', player.duration());
        updateTimeDisplays();
    });
    
    // Frame-perfect calculations
    function secondsToFrames(seconds) {
        return Math.floor(seconds * videoFPS);
    }
    
    function framesToSeconds(frames) {
        return frames / videoFPS;
    }
    
    function formatTimecode(seconds, includeFrames = true) {
        const totalFrames = Math.floor(seconds * videoFPS);
        const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
        const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
        const secs = Math.floor(seconds % 60);
        const frames = totalFrames % videoFPS;
        
        if (includeFrames) {
            return `${hours.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}.${frames.toString().padStart(3, '0')}`;
        } else {
            const milliseconds = Math.floor((seconds % 1) * 1000);
            return `${hours.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}.${milliseconds.toString().padStart(3, '0')}`;
        }
    }
    
    function parseTimecode(timecode) {
        if (!timecode) return 0;
        
        // If it's just a number, treat as seconds
        if (!isNaN(timecode)) return parseFloat(timecode);
        
        const parts = timecode.split(':');
        let seconds = 0;
        
        if (parts.length === 3) {
            // HH:MM:SS.fff
            seconds = parseInt(parts[0]) * 3600 + parseInt(parts[1]) * 60 + parseFloat(parts[2]);
        } else if (parts.length === 2) {
            // MM:SS.fff
            seconds = parseInt(parts[0]) * 60 + parseFloat(parts[1]);
        } else if (parts.length === 1) {
            // SS.fff
            seconds = parseFloat(parts[0]);
        }
        
        const maxDuration = player.duration() || videoDuration;
        return Math.max(0, Math.min(seconds, maxDuration));
    }
    
    // Update all time displays with REAL player time
    function updateTimeDisplays() {
        const currentTime = player.currentTime() || 0;
        const frame = secondsToFrames(currentTime);
        
        currentTimeDisplay.textContent = formatTimecode(currentTime, false);
        currentFrameDisplay.textContent = frame;
        
        // Update clip duration if both start and end are set
        if (startTime !== null && endTime !== null) {
            const duration = endTime - startTime;
            clipDurationDisplay.textContent = formatTimecode(duration, false);
        } else {
            clipDurationDisplay.textContent = '00:00:00.000';
        }
    }
    
    // REAL seeking with Video.js
    function seekToTime(newTime) {
        const maxDuration = player.duration() || videoDuration;
        const clampedTime = Math.max(0, Math.min(newTime, maxDuration));
        
        player.currentTime(clampedTime);
        updateTimeDisplays();
        updateTimelinePosition();
    }
    
    // Frame-by-frame navigation (REAL)
    function stepFrame(direction) {
        const currentTime = player.currentTime() || 0;
        const currentFrame = secondsToFrames(currentTime);
        const newFrame = Math.max(0, currentFrame + direction);
        const newTime = framesToSeconds(newFrame);
        
        seekToTime(newTime);
    }
    
    // Jump by seconds (REAL)
    function jumpSeconds(seconds) {
        const currentTime = player.currentTime() || 0;
        seekToTime(currentTime + seconds);
    }
    
    // Update timeline position indicator
    function updateTimelinePosition() {

    // Update clip marker on timeline
    function updateClipMarker() {
        const duration = player.duration() || videoDuration;
        
        if (startTime !== null && endTime !== null && duration > 0) {
            const startPercent = (startTime / duration) * 100;
            const endPercent = (endTime / duration) * 100;
            const width = endPercent - startPercent;
            
            clipMarker.style.left = startPercent + '%';
            clipMarker.style.width = width + '%';
            clipMarker.style.display = 'block';
        }
    }
    
    // Mark in/out points with REAL player time
    function markIn() {
        startTime = player.currentTime() || 0;
        startTimeInput.value = Math.floor(startTime);
        startTimeTc.value = formatTimecode(startTime, false);
        updateClipMarker();
        updateTimeDisplays();
        console.log(`In point marked at ${formatTimecode(startTime)}`);
    }
    
    function markOut() {
        endTime = player.currentTime() || 0;
        endTimeInput.value = Math.floor(endTime);
        endTimeTc.value = formatTimecode(endTime, false);
        updateClipMarker();
        updateTimeDisplays();
        console.log(`Out point marked at ${formatTimecode(endTime)}`);
    }
    
    // Toggle play/pause (REAL)
    function togglePlayPause() {
        if (player.paused()) {
            player.play();
        } else {
            player.pause();
        }
    }
    
    // Preview clip (REAL)
    function previewClip() {
        if (startTime !== null && endTime !== null) {
            seekToTime(startTime);
            player.play();
            
            // Auto-pause at end time
            const checkEndTime = function() {
                if (player.currentTime() >= endTime) {
                    player.pause();
                    player.off('timeupdate', checkEndTime);
                }
            };
            player.on('timeupdate', checkEndTime);
        } else {
            alert('Please mark both start and end times first.');
        }
    }
    
    // Keyboard event handler (works with REAL player)
    function handleKeyboard(e) {
        // Don't trigger shortcuts when typing in form fields
        if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || e.target.tagName === 'SELECT') {
            if (e.key === 'Enter' && e.target.closest('#clip-form')) {
                e.preventDefault();
                document.getElementById('clip-form').dispatchEvent(new Event('submit'));
            }
            return;
        }
        
        // Don't interfere if player has focus
        if (e.target.closest('.video-js')) {
            return;
        }
        
        switch (e.key) {
            case ' ':
                e.preventDefault();
                togglePlayPause();
                break;
            case 'i':
            case 'I':
                e.preventDefault();
                markIn();
                break;
            case 'o':
            case 'O':
                e.preventDefault();
                markOut();
                break;
            case 'p':
            case 'P':
                e.preventDefault();
                previewClip();
                break;
            case 'ArrowLeft':
                e.preventDefault();
                if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {
                    jumpSeconds(-10);
                } else if (e.shiftKey) {
                    jumpSeconds(-1);
                } else {
                    stepFrame(-1);
                }
                break;
            case 'ArrowRight':
                e.preventDefault();
                if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {
                    jumpSeconds(10);
                } else if (e.shiftKey) {
                    jumpSeconds(1);
                } else {
                    stepFrame(1);
                }
                break;
            case 'Escape':
                e.preventDefault();
                hideKeyboardHelp();
                clearSelection();
                break;
            case '?':
                e.preventDefault();
                showKeyboardHelp();
                break;
        }
    }
